name: Butterburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the cottage cheese, egg, seasonings (salt and MSG), and chopped green onions.
2. Add 3 tablespoons of melted butter to the mixture. Beat well to combine.
3. Gradually add the ground beef to the mixture and stir until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
4. Form the mixture into 4 patties.
5. Melt 5 tablespoons of butter in a hot frying pan over medium heat.
6. Cook the burgers until they reach your desired level of doneness, turning only once.
7. Cut four hamburger buns in half and briefly dip the cut sides into the pan drippings.
8. Place the patties on the toasted buns and garnish with pickle spears (or any preferred toppings).
9. Serve immediately. These burgers have a rich beefy flavor enhanced by the addition of butter, which will add extra richness when you want added flavor.
